chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْمُطَلَّقَةَ ثَلَاثاً لَا سُكْنَى لَهَا وَ لَا نَفَقَةَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – The woman divorced thrice, there is neither a dwelling for her nor expenses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/176)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/176)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ

text: حُبْلَى هِيَ قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, or a man, from Hammad, from Shuayb, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about the woman divorced thrice, is there a dwelling for her and expenses?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Is she pregnant?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa or a man from Hammad from Shu’ayb from abu Basir who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about the case of a woman who is divorced three times; if she deserves maintenance and accommodation. He (the Imam) asked, ‘Is she pregnant?’ I replied, ‘No, she is not pregnant.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘No, she does not deserve it.’”
